SYNTHETIC FIXTURE - NOT A RECORDED DEED. For parser testing only.

Part of the Southeast Quarter of Section 14, Township 16 North, Range 4 East,
Marion County, Indiana, described as follows:

Beginning at a point of reference;

thence North 45 degrees 00 minutes 00 seconds East, 300.00 feet;
thence Southeasterly along a curve to the right having a radius of 500.00
feet, an arc length of 261.80 feet, and a chord bearing South 60 degrees 00
minutes 00 seconds East, a chord 258.82 feet;
thence South 45 degrees 00 minutes 00 seconds West, 300.00 feet;
thence North 45 degrees 00 minutes 00 seconds West, 282.84 feet to the Point
of Beginning.
